task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Internal Request Queue** (Level 8)

Build an internal request queue for IT/HR/Facilities/Finance tickets. Employees submit a request (title, description, category, priority, submitter). Ops staff can update requests (requires login) — change status, assign to a team, add resolution notes. Need: POST /api/requests (public), GET /api/requests (list), GET /api/requests/new (filter by status='new'), PUT /api/requests/:id (auth required).

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Requests table:
  title, required
  description
  category, default 'IT'
  priority, default 'Normal'
  submitter, required
  status, default 'new'
  assigned_to
  resolution_notes

owner is 'ops@company.com'
allow signup and login

/* POST /api/requests — public endpoint, any employee can submit a ticket */

when user sends request_data to /api/requests:
  validate request_data:
    title is text, required
    submitter is text, required
  saved = save request_data as new Requests
  send back saved with status 201

/* GET /api/requests/new — filter to only new/unassigned tickets */

when user calls GET /api/requests/new:
  new_tickets = get all Requests where status is 'new'
  send back new_tickets

/* GET /api/requests — list all tickets */

when user calls GET /api/requests:
  all_tickets = get all Requests
  send back all_tickets

/* PUT /api/requests/:id — ops staff update status, assign, add notes */

when user calls PUT /api/requests/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  changes's id is this id
  save changes to Requests
  send back changes

/* Employee submit page */

page 'Submit Request' at '/':
  section 'Submit a Request':
    heading 'Submit a Request'
    'Title' as text input saved as req_title
    'Description' as text area saved as req_description
    'Category' as dropdown with ['IT', 'HR', 'Facilities', 'Finance'] saved as req_category
    'Priority' as dropdown with ['Low', 'Normal', 'High', 'Critical'] saved as req_priority
    'Your Name' as text input saved as req_submitter
    button 'Submit Request':
      send {title: req_title, description: req_description, category: req_category, priority: req_priority, submitter: req_submitter} as a new record to '/api/requests'

/* Ops triage view */

page 'Ops Triage' at '/ops':
  on page load get all_tickets from '/api/requests'
  section 'Requests Queue':
    heading 'All Requests'
    display all_tickets as table
